issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: setup-django-project-with-custom-user
scenarios.rationale: Both responses cover the required Django commands and custom user setup, but neither includes the os.environ usage for secrets; A is slightly more concise and directly addresses the key steps, giving it a marginal edge.

scenarios.name: create-article-list-view-with-selectrelated
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric items, while Response B omits the required core/urls.py registration and myproject/urls.py inclusion.
